title: 10 best herbal teas for jet lag
description: Purple coneflower teas helps with jet lag because it contains a unique blend of herbs that work together to regulate the body's natural circadian rhythms. The calming effects of the tea help reduce stress and anxiety, while its adaptogenic properties allow it to gently adjust the body's internal clock to the new time zone.
